## Checklist

- [ ] I used English as the default language for new content.
- [ ] If non-English content was added, I included English context where practical.
- [ ] I followed the repository folder and naming conventions.
- [ ] I included or updated usage instructions where needed.
- [ ] I validated the demo/template/agent flow end-to-end.
